name: property managers managing 10-50 rental units tool
description: For property managers managing 10-50 rental units, inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance causes missed maintenance schedules. We automate asset management instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance and depreciation
